title: Exercise Cyclone
description: Source: PIB Subject: Security Context: The Indian Army contingent has departed for Egypt to participate in the fourth edition of the Joint Special Forces Exercise Cyclone – IV. About Exercise Cyclone: What it is? Exercise Cyclone is a bilateral military drill specifically designed for the Special Forces units of India and Egypt.
